The meeting embeds feature used in the online or hybrid meetings is subject to potential XSS attack through a malformed URL.

### Patches

Not available

### Workarounds

Disable the creation of meetings by participants in the meeting component.

### References

OWASP ASVS v4.0.3-5.1.3

### Credits

This issue was discovered in a security audit organized by mitgestalten Partizipationsbüro against Decidim. The security audit was implemented by the Austrian Institute of Technology.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00243, "percentile": 0.15247}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-j4h6-gcj7-7v9v", "github_reviewed_at": "2024-11-13T17:24:40Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j4h6-gcj7-7v9v", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-j4h6-gcj7-7v9v"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2024-45594"}], "nvd_published_at": "2024-11-13T17:15:10Z", "published_at": "2024-11-13T17:24:40Z", "references": ["https://github.com/decidim/decidim/security/advisories/GHSA-j4h6-gcj7-7v9v", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-45594", "https://github.com/rubysec/ruby-advisory-db/blob/master/gems/decidim-meetings/CVE-2024-45594.yml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j4h6-gcj7-7v9v"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/decidim/decidim/security-advisories/GHSA-j4h6-gcj7-7v9v", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/decidim/decidim", "summary": "decidim-meetings Cross-site scripting vulnerability in the online or hybrid meeting embeds", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-18T17:21:55Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-j4h6-gcj7-7v9v", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.28.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "rubygems", "name": "decidim-meetings"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.28.0, < 0.28.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: decidim-meetings Cross-site scripting vulnerability in the online or hybrid meeting embeds
